title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at 1mg Capital India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at 1mg Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the 1mg Capital India family as a Frontend Developer in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About 1mg Capital India:
1mg Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg Capital India!
